event: Street scene near Pont Saint Michel and Notre-Dame, Paris
description: A bustling Parisian street scene shows pedestrians, horse-drawn carriages, and figures with umbrellas near the Pont Saint Michel. The twin towers of Notre-Dame cathedral are visible in the background on the left. Haussmann-style buildings line the right side. The wet pavement reflects the gray sky and warm light from shop fronts. The scene is painted in an impressionistic style with soft, atmospheric tones of gray, blue, and warm amber.
